languages.text: "Если вы правы, то каждую петлю точка отсчета моей инфо-разметки сбивается. Это серьезно ограничивает радиус мыслей".
"If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."
languages.original_text: "Если вы правы, то каждую петлю точка отсчета моей инфо-разметки сбивается. Это серьезно ограничивает радиус мыслей".

traits.locale_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."
"If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."
"If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

languages.text: “若你所言属实，那么我的数据索引会随着每次循环而愈发走偏。这严重限制了我的思维半径。”
languages.original_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

traits.locale_text: “若你所言属实，那么我的数据索引会随着每次循环而愈发走偏。这严重限制了我的思维半径。”

languages.text: « Si vous avez raison, cela signifie que mon index de données diverge de plus en plus à chaque boucle, ce qui limite considérablement mon amplitude de pensée. »
languages.original_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous avez raison, cela signifie que mon index de données diverge de plus en plus à chaque boucle, ce qui limite considérablement mon amplitude de pensée. »

languages.text: "Haklıysanız her döngünün ardından veri dizinimde daha fazla sapma gerçekleşiyordur. Bu durum, düşünce yarıçapımı ciddi anlamda sınırlandırıyor."
languages.original_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

traits.locale_text: "Haklıysanız her döngünün ardından veri dizinimde daha fazla sapma gerçekleşiyordur. Bu durum, düşünce yarıçapımı ciddi anlamda sınırlandırıyor."

languages.text: «Si está en lo cierto, mi índice de datos diverge más con cada ciclo. Eso limita seriamente mi radio de pensamiento».
languages.original_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

traits.locale_text: «Si está en lo cierto, mi índice de datos diverge más con cada ciclo. Eso limita seriamente mi radio de pensamiento».

languages.text: "Falls Ihr recht habt, divergiert mein Datenindex mit jeder Schleife stärker und stärker. Das grenzt meinen Denkradius ernsthaft ein."
languages.original_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

traits.locale_text: "Falls Ihr recht habt, divergiert mein Datenindex mit jeder Schleife stärker und stärker. Das grenzt meinen Denkradius ernsthaft ein."

languages.text: 「もしあなたが正しいなら、私のデータインデックスはループごとにますます乖離していく。これは私の思考の範囲を深刻に制限する」
languages.original_text: "If you are correct, then my data-index diverges further and further with every loop. This seriously limits my radius of thought."

traits.locale_text: 「もしあなたが正しいなら、私のデータインデックスはループごとにますます乖離していく。これは私の思考の範囲を深刻に制限する」
